doc: A self-playing step melody (ADR-0032). The Clock's beat gate drives a sequencer that emits degree Messages — one per beat through an 8-step pattern (an ascending scale, degrees 0..7) — into a Voicer, which resolves each degree to Hz through the tonal context (default C-major/12-TET) and plays it on a hosted `sequence-voice` sub-patch. Set tempo via /clock/tempo; edit the line via /sequencer/step1../sequencer/step8 (scale degree, below 0 = rest) and /sequencer/length; send /clock/sync to relocate beat 1. To make it re-spell in another key, see scale-demo.json.

nodes.doc: Walks the pattern one step per beat -> note Messages.
Hosts 4 sequence-voice sub-patches; allocates each step's note across them and sums their audio.
